*.jl.cov
*.jl.cs
*.jl.mem
deps/deps.jl
deps/build.log

# Ignore the Manifest! Packages should only commit Project.toml
Manifest.toml

.vscode/
.idea/
*.swp
*.swo
*~

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
.DS_Store?
._*
.Spotlight-V100
.Trashes

Thumbs.db
